# Maintainer Manual Legal Confirmation Comment (Temporary)

Use this comment on pull requests until automated CLA enforcement is enabled.

---

Thanks for the contribution.

Before this PR can be merged, please reply to this thread with the following statement:

"I confirm that I have the legal right to submit this contribution and I agree to the contributor legal terms in CLA.md, including copyright assignment."

Once confirmed, maintainer review and required CI checks can proceed to merge.
